73635.subject: Britain is quietly de-Brexiting
73635.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9AAcAAAAAAeSCGsXvn7-8XwZ4Fzgr58hsCMeRlnVy1q4Rsbp_Zzlj48We4h2nt6NrkO-iUytPf6lWZt-qS_hq6GUStEp3On5_iSIYiQrRtPVKHLzQLadkww 

May 26th 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9AAcAAAAAAeSCGsXwvNgZymMX3KrRUtGYc-gsxNLgWx4kMly6MIkgAxLeB2cTKAneWiUICRaPV-Y3B-5KEOpXoOzlKqhg4L2usu6Rc_DcjaenMbzOkd2cqw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9AAcAAAAAAeSCGsXxVvYoTT-zVTQuYKQ3CxEKjEfBvtpuvyNtE3dElCY85EFXfV_WnZESksyVHcCoPCHY4XGh1o22o3BnsCeSBERD_I2-NMD0zCGcghTRGg 



 
 

Patrick Lane

Senior digital editor



 As the tenth anniversary of the Brexit vote draws near, Britain has in some ways quietly 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9AAcAAAAAAeSCGsXyC8gEwLlmQncFpRs6qUNw7oaDhtKEpyymCMFAfCy1ZIv1iepgZCmiBIt72MlShvN5n_e1mPqp1gUa-i3c15FWVFAY899B-Rgm 
realigned itself 
 with the European Union. But there are big obstacles, both financial and political, in the way of a closer relationship. 


 A study published three years ago concluded that science was producing fewer breakthroughs and more incremental advances. New research proposes an explanation: 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9AAcAAAAAAeSCGsXz5QQQjp9RFbgCYktWLi53R_-vvBO6aRES4reQA_TvmOY-tbat4ndbl91DyvaJ0wqpCqkW87CBfhtXLm9qIDDVCHdEVkKFAnE4

73634.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-26-cryptobeholder-qemzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BfA5gcue8SLOI%2FM3hc%2FzvAQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0QmXSNV2ECEsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpmtum6w~hi-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpmtum6w-hi
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Markets enter cautious consolidation as Bitcoin volatility hits historic lows. While institutional accumulation from firms like Strive persists, heavy ETF outflows signal cooling retail demand. Regulatory clarity via the CLARITY Act remains the primary catalyst. 📉Bitcoin Volatility Hits 9-Month Low Amid $77K Consolidation Bitcoin’s expected volatility has dropped to its lowest level since 2023 as the asset struggles to break the $80,000 resistance. Market analysts point to $1 billion in monthly ETF outflows as a sign of temporary cooling in retail demand. Read full story 💰Strive Asset Management Adds 1,109 Bitcoin to Treasury Strive (ASST) has increased its total holdings to 16,500 BTC, positioning itself as the seventh-largest public corporate holder globally. The firm continues a strategy of aggressive accumulation to provide shareholders with direct digital asset exposure. See details 🏛️Digital Asset Market Clarity Act Advances Through Senate The CLARITY Act has successfully passed the Senate Banking Committee, moving closer to a final July 4 deadline. The legislation aims to unify US crypto oversight and provide the regulatory certainty needed for multi-trillion dollar institutional entries. Read full story 🚨White House Executive Order Mandates Regulatory Reassessment President Trump signed a directive ordering federal agencies to eliminate outdated barriers hindering digital asset integration. The order specifically targets the removal of restrictive accounting rules and encourages bank-grade crypto custody. See details 💎Bitmine Immersion Holdings Reach 4.4% of Total Ether Supply Bitmine (BMNR) now holds 5.39 million ETH, valued at over $10 billion, following a massive staking-focused accumulation drive. The firm's total crypto and cash reserves have reached a milestone of $12.3 billion. Read full story 🚀NEAR Protocol Surges 15% on AI-Native Blockchain Upgrades Defying a broader market dip, NEAR Protocol hit a six-month high driven by anticipation of the v2.13 network upgrade. Investors are increasingly positioning in NEAR due to its specialized architecture for high-performance AI operations. See details 📊Crypto Funds Record $1.47 Billion in Weekly Outflows Global digital asset funds experienced their third-largest outflow of 2026 as investors pulled capital from major Bitcoin pro

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
